creator: anders@fix.no
text:
Crippled output in several applications, ncftp being one of them. I assume
the fairly oldish termcap database in FreeBSD would be well off with an
update.

Fix: 

Incorporate the database found at http://tuxedo.org/~esr/terminfo/? It's
the master database of terminal descriptions from BSD UNIX, and _should_
fix it (?). :)
How-To-Repeat: 
Compile ncftp-2.4.3 from the ports collection, run it with VT100 
emulation.
